message.content:
Explore the iskrib_v3 codebase to understand all the pages, UI components, and user-facing features. I need to understand what the user sees and experiences.

Focus on:
1. All routes defined in the React router — check `App.jsx` or wherever routes are defined
2. The Home page layout and what components it renders — sidebar, feed, editor
3. The sidebar navigation — what links/sections exist
4. The profile page — what tabs or sections users see
5. Collections feature — what it does
6. The editor capabilities — what types of content can users create (text, canvas, images)
7. Any onboarding or first-time user experience
8. Modal components — what modals exist
9. Settings page — what can users configure
10. Check for any empty/stub components that were planned but not built yet

Thoroughness: very thorough

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the iskrib_v3 codebase to understand all user-facing features, pages, and UI components. Let me start by mapping out the structure and then diving into specifics.

input.description: Find main app entry points and route files

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the iskrib_v3 platform. Let me compile a detailed report of all the user-facing features:

## Comprehensive iskrib_v3 Codebase Exploration Report

### Routes & Page Structure (from App.jsx)

The application has the following main routes:

**Public Routes:**
- `/login` - LoginPage
- `/signUp` - SignUp  
- `/universe` - Universe (interactive 3D visualization)

**Home Outlet Routes** (`/home/*`)
- `/home` - Home page (default feed with PostCards)
- `/home/explore` - ExplorePage (trending/hottest posts)
- `/home/gallery` - GalleryPage (canvas-based visual posts)
- `/home/freedom-wall` - FreedomWallPage (collaborative doodle wall)
- `/home/post/:journalId` - ContentView (post detail)
- `/home/post/:journalId/:slug` - ContentView (SEO-friendly slug variant)
- `/home/bookmark` - Bookmarks (saved posts)
- `/home/userCollections` - ViewUserCollection
- `/home/collections` - Collections (create/manage collections of posts)
- `/home/collectionCards` - CollectionJournals (view posts in a collection)
- `/home/opinions` - OpinionsPage (view all opinions/thoughts)
- `/home/opinionsViewer` - OpinionViewer (single opinion detail)
- `/home/settings` - SettingsPage (change password/email)
- `/home/notifications` - Notifications (inbox, with subroutes)
  - `/home/notifications` - All notifications
  - `/home/notifications/unreadNotification` - Unread only

**Stories Routes** (`/home/stories/*`)
- `/home/stories` - StoryBrowser (discover stories)
- `/home/stories/library` - StoryLibrary (saved/reading library)
- `/home/stories/dashboard` - StoryDashboard (user's own stories)
- `/home/stories/new` - StoryEditor (create new story)
- `/home/stories/:storyId` - StoryDetail (view story)
- `/home/stories/:storyId/edit` - StoryEditor (edit existing)
- `/home/stories/:storyId/manage` - StoryChapterManager (manage chapters)
- `/home/stories/:storyId/chapter/:chapterId` - ChapterReader (read chapter)
- `/home/stories/:storyId/chapter/:chapterId/edit` - ChapterEditor (edit chapter)

**Profile Routes**
- `/profile` - MyProfile (logged-in user's profile)
  - `/profile` (index) - ProfilePostCards (writings tab)
  - `/profile/media` - ProfileMediaSection (images tab)
  - `/profile/myOpinions` - MyOpinions (opinions tab)
  - `/profile/stories` - ProfileStoriesSection (stories tab)

- `/visitProfile?userId=X` - Visitprofile (visit others' profiles - legacy)
  - `/visitProfile` (index) - VisitedProfilePostCards
  - `/visitProfile/media` - VisitedProfileMediaSection
  - `/visitProfile/visitedCollections` - CollectionViewer
  - `/visitProfile/visitedOpinions` - VisitedProfileOpinions
  - `/visitProfile/stories` - VisitedProfileStoriesSection

- `/u/:username` - Visitprofile (new SEO-friendly routes)
  - `/u/:username` (index) - VisitedProfilePostCards
  - `/u/:username/media` - VisitedProfileMediaSection
  - `/u/:username/collections` - CollectionViewer
  - `/u/:username/opinions` - VisitedProfileOpinions
  - `/u/:username/stories` - VisitedProfileStoriesSection

---

### Home Page Layout

**File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\Home.jsx`

**Key Components:**
1. **Sidebar** (left) - Navigation with links
2. **Center Feed** (main content area)
3. **Right Sidebar** - SidebarOpinions (community opinions panel)

**Sidebar Links:**
- Home icon - `/home` feed
- Explore icon - `/home/explore` (trending posts)
- Gallery icon - `/home/gallery` (canvas creations)
- Universe icon - `/universe` (3D visualization)
- Profile icon - `/profile` (if authenticated)
- Notifications icon - `/home/notifications` (with unread count badge)
- Bookmarks icon - `/home/bookmark`
- Collections icon - `/home/collections`
- Settings icon - `/home/settings`
- Write button - Opens main editor

**Guest Links:**
- Log in button
- Sign up button

**Features:**
- Profile setup modal on first login (name, bio, username, avatar)
- Write Journal Button (floating action) - Opens editor
- Welcome Message modal (confetti animation on first signup)
- Theme toggle (light/dark mode) in sidebar
- Sidebar user card showing logged-in user's avatar, name, email, and sign-out button
- Mobile responsive with MobileNavLink and MobileSidebarLink

---

### Sidebar Navigation (Sidebar.jsx)

**Components:**
- Logo "Iskrib" at top
- Vertical icon-based navigation links
- Active state styling based on current route
- Notification count badge on Notifications link
- Theme toggle at bottom
- User card with:
  - Profile avatar
  - User name with verified badge
  - Email address
  - Sign Out button

---

### Editor Capabilities (Editor.jsx)

The editor supports two modes:

**1. Text Mode (Rich Text Editor)**
- Uses Lexical rich text editor
- Supports:
  - Headings (h1, h2, h3)
  - Bold, italic, underline text formatting
  - Quotes (block quotes)
  - Images (custom ImageNode)
  - Paragraph styling
- Title input field
- Word count tracking

**2. Canvas Mode**
- Visual drawing/design creation
- Can remix existing canvases (Remix: prefix auto-added to title)
- Canvas-specific preview rendering

**Shared Features:**
- Title input
- Mode toggle button (switch between text and canvas)
- Close button
- Clears editor state on close
- Manages uploaded image cleanup

---

### Profile Page (MyProfile.jsx)

**User can customize:**
- Profile avatar (with upload and cropping)
- Name (20 char limit)
- Bio (150 char limit)
- Username (auto-suggested from name, real-time availability check)
- Background: 
  - Preset gradients (multiple color themes)
  - Custom image background with crop/zoom
- Font color picker (for profile text)

**Profile Layout:**
- Hero section with:
  - Avatar with optional badge ring (legend/OG)
  - Follower/Following counts
  - Name and username handle
  - Bio
  - Edit button, Font color picker, Share button

- Tab navigation:
  - Writings (ProfilePostCards) - user's posts
  - Media (ProfileMediaSection) - user's images
  - Opinions (MyOpinions) - user's opinions
  - Stories (ProfileStoriesSection) - user's stories

**Features:**
- Profile edit modal with image preview
- Dominant color extraction from profile background
- Glass morphism design with gradient backgrounds
- Customizable background picker with color palettes
- Share menu to copy profile link

---

### Profile Tabs & Sections

**1. Writings/Posts**
- ProfilePostCards - displays user's journal posts
- Shows post title, excerpt, images, engagement metrics

**2. Media**
- ProfileMediaSection - gallery of all images user posted
- Grid layout display

**3. Opinions**
- MyOpinions - user's written opinions (280 char limit)
- SidebarOpinions on home shows community opinions feed

**4. Stories**
- ProfileStoriesSection - user's published stories
- Shows story cover, title, chapter count, status (ongoing/completed/hiatus)

---

### Collections Feature (Collection.jsx)

**What it does:**
- Users can group multiple posts into named collections
- Create curated collections with title and description
- Browse posts and select multiple to add to collection
- Collections appear in their profile

**Workflow:**
1. Click Collections in sidebar
2. Click to create new collection
3. Add title and description
4. Select posts from "older posts" modal
5. Save collection with selected posts
6. View user's collections on their profile

**Components:**
- Collection.jsx - main collection management
- CollectionJournalCards.jsx - view posts in a collection
- CollectionViewer.jsx - view others' collections
- ViewUserCollections.jsx - user's all collections
- NotCollectedJournals.jsx - posts not yet in any collection

---

### Post Features

**Post Card Display (PostCards.jsx):**
- Post title and excerpt
- Author avatar with name and verified badge
- Post date
- Like count, comment count, bookmark count
- Preview image (first image in post)
- Reading time estimate
- Like button (heart icon)
- Bookmark button
- Repost button (with optional caption modal)
- Comment section (collapsible)

**Post Viewer (ContentView.jsx):**
- Full post content in Lexical editor (read-only)
- Rich text rendering with images
- Comments section below post
- Like/Bookmark/Repost/Share buttons
- Related posts section (discovery engine)
- Canvas post preview (special handling)
- Author info and follow button
- Share menu

---

### Explore Page (ExplorePage.jsx)

**Features:**
- "Hottest" badge showing #1 trending post
- Hot score calculated from: views, likes, comments, bookmarks
- Hero card with trending post
- Infinite scroll loading
- Post search within explore
- User search results
- Sort mode (hottest, etc.)

---

### Gallery Page (GalleryPage.jsx)

**Features:**
- Canvas/visual posts gallery
- Infinite scroll pagination
- Sort modes (hottest, recent, etc.)
- Remix button - create variation of canvas
- "Remix:" prefix auto-added to remixed titles
- Canvas preview generation
- Click to open canvas in viewer

---

### Freedom Wall (FreedomWallPage.jsx)

**Interactive collaborative drawing canvas:**
- Weekly rotating wall (different canvas each week)
- Tools:
  - Doodle (freehand drawing)
  - Sticker (emoji/icon placement)
  - Stamp (reaction stamps: heart, star, fire, sparkles, wow)
  - Note (text notes with font/style/color options)
  - Eraser
- Color swatches:
  - Pastel palette
  - Earth tones
  - Neon colors
  - Classic colors
  - Custom color picker
- Font options: Arial, Georgia, Courier, Trebuchet, Times
- Text styles: normal, bold, italic
- Max canvas size: 1080x900px
- Create, update, delete doodles
- Report inappropriate content
- Clear own doodles
- View all items on current week's wall

### Universe (Universe.jsx)

**Interactive 3D cosmic visualization:**
- Interactive space visualization with Konva Stage
- Galaxy exploration (posts positioned as "stars" in space)
- Constellation connections (related posts linked)
- Camera pan/zoom controls
- Layers:
  - DeepSpaceLayer - background stars
  - MidGalaxyLayer - galaxy structures
  - NebulaLayer - nebula clouds
  - ConstellationLayer - post connections
  - InteractiveLayer - clickable posts
  - WormholeLayer - space warping effects
  - RocketLayer - rocket ship navigation

**Features:**
- Strategic mode vs Rocket mode (navigation styles)
- Minimap panel for overview
- Constellation panel showing linked posts
- Rocket HUD (heads-up display) for rocket mode
- Virtual joystick for mobile rocket navigation
- Click posts to view details
- Galaxy-based content discovery
- Cosmic gravity physics simulation

---

### Opinions Feature (SidebarOpinions.jsx)

**What it is:**
- 280-character opinion/thought sharing (like Twitter)
- Free speech space for short takes
- Displayed in right sidebar on home

**Components:**
- OpinionEditor.jsx - create opinion modal
- SidebarOpinions.jsx - feed of opinions in right sidebar
- OpinionsPage.jsx - full page view of all opinions
- MyOpinions.jsx - user's written opinions
- OpinionViewer.jsx - read single opinion with replies
- OpinionsCardReply.jsx - reply to opinions

**Workflow:**
1. Click "Write opinions" in sidebar
2. Type opinion (max 280 chars with visual indicator)
3. Save
4. View own opinions on profile
5. Click opinion to view/reply

---

### Stories Feature (Wattpad-Style)

**Complete story management system:**

**Story Dashboard** (`/home/stories/dashboard`)
- View all user's stories
- Statistics: word count per story, published chapters count
- Delete stories with confirmation
- Create new story button

**Story Creation** (`/home/stories/new`)
- Story title, description, cover image
- Genre selection
- Visibility settings
- Status: Ongoing, Completed, Hiatus

**Story Management** (`/home/stories/:storyId/manage`)
- Chapter management interface
- Reorder chapters
- Publish/unpublish chapters
- Delete chapters

**Chapter Editor** (`/home/stories/:storyId/chapter/:chapterId/edit`)
- Rich text editor for chapter content
- Title and order management
- Word count tracking
- Publish/draft status

**Chapter Reader** (`/home/stories/:storyId/chapter/:chapterId`)
- Full chapter display
- Navigation to previous/next chapters
- Comment section (paragraph-level comments)
- Engagement metrics
- Table of contents

**Story Discovery:**
- StoryBrowser (`/home/stories`) - discover new stories
- StoryLibrary (`/home/stories/library`) - saved/reading list
- StoryDetail (`/home/stories/:storyId`) - story overview

**Story Components:**
- StoryDashboard.jsx - user's story list
- StoryEditor.jsx - create/edit stories
- StoryChapterManager.jsx - chapter management
- ChapterEditor.jsx - edit chapter content
- ChapterReader.jsx - read chapter
- ChapterCommentCard.jsx - paragraph comments
- CommentPanel.jsx - comment UI
- StoryBrowser.jsx - discover stories
- StoryLibrary.jsx - reading library
- StoryDetail.jsx - story page
- ProfileStoriesSection.jsx - stories on profile

### Bookmarks (Bookmarks.jsx)

**Features:**
- Infinite scroll list of saved posts
- Settings menu per bookmark (e.g., remove)
- Click to view full post
- Search bookmarks
- Show/hide header on scroll
- Timestamp for when bookmarked

### Notifications (Notifications.jsx)

**Nested Routes:**
- `/home/notifications` - All notifications (NotificationCards)
- `/home/notifications/unreadNotification` - Unread only (UnreadNotificationCard)

**Features:**
- Infinite scroll loading
- Real-time notification count in sidebar badge
- Tabs to switch between All/Unread
- Back button
- Notification cards showing:
  - Who interacted
  - What action (like, comment, follow, etc.)
  - Link to content

### Settings Page (SettingsPage.jsx)

**Change Password:**
- Current password field (if not in recovery mode)
- New password (min 6 chars)
- Confirm password
- Password visibility toggle
- Error/success messages

**Change Email:**
- New email input
- Validation
- Confirmation email sent message
- Error handling

**Recovery Mode:**
- Can set password without current password (for password recovery flow)
- Query param: `?recovery=true`

### Modals & Dialogs

**1. AuthModal (AuthModal.jsx)**
- Displayed when guest tries to interact with authenticated features
- Login and Sign Up buttons
- Close button
- Spring animation entrance

**2. ProfileEditModal (ProfileEditModal.jsx)**
- Edit name, bio, avatar, background
- Image cropping interface
- Gradient picker for background
- Save/Cancel buttons

**3. RepostModal (RepostModal.jsx)**
- Shows original post preview
- Optional caption field (280 char limit)
- Original author info with badge
- Repost/Cancel buttons
- Error handling

**4. WelcomeMessage (WelcomeMessage.jsx)**
- Onboarding message for new users
- Confetti animation
- Celebratory emoji icon
- Welcome text with "Iskrib" emphasis
- Dismissible close button

**5. ShareMenu (ShareMenu.jsx)**
- Share post/profile URL
- Copy link functionality
- Position relative to trigger button

---

### First-Time User Experience

**Onboarding Flow:**
1. User signs up → redirected to `/home`
2. Profile setup modal appears if user data doesn't exist
   - Asks for: Name, Bio, Username, Avatar
   - Username auto-suggested from name
   - Real-time availability checking
   - Save button disabled until name & bio filled
3. Welcome message modal displays with confetti
4. Profile now set up, can start creating content

---

### Features by Content Type

**Posts/Journals:**
- Create via rich text editor
- Support text, images, headings, quotes, bold/italic/underline
- Can be remixed (copied with "Remix:" prefix)
- Embeds first image as cover
- Engagement: likes, comments, bookmarks, reposts

**Canvas Creations:**
- Visual art/design posts
- Full canvas editor
- Gallery view of all canvas posts
- Can remix existing canvases
- Canvas-specific preview rendering

**Opinions:**
- 280 character short-form thoughts
- Can reply to opinions
- Appear in right sidebar feed
- View full page of all opinions

**Stories:**
- Multi-chapter serialized content
- Word count tracking
- Publish/draft chapter status
- Paragraph-level comments
- Reading progress tracking
- Ratings/votes
- Genre organization

### Empty/Stub Components (Not Fully Built)

Based on the code review, the following areas appear less developed or partially stubbed:

1. **Universe** - Complex but may have incomplete features
2. **Freedom Wall** - Full features but less polished UI
3. **Story Comments** - Paragraph-level comment layer implemented but may need full integration
4. **Collections** - Core functionality present but may need more polish
5. **Opinions** - Simpler implementation, seems less feature-rich than posts

---

### Key UI/UX Patterns

**Navigation:**
- Icon-based sidebar (cleaner than text)
- Active route highlighting
- Mobile-responsive sidebar toggle
- Tab navigation for profile sections

**Modals & Overlays:**
- Framer Motion for animations
- AnimatePresence for exit animations
- Backdrop click to close
- Spring stiffness for bouncy feel

**Loading States:**
- MoonLoader, BeatLoader spinners
- Skeleton screens where appropriate
- Infinite scroll with "more" indicators

**Responsive Design:**
- useMediaQuery hook for mobile detection
- Mobile sidebar menu
- Mobile nav link bar at bottom
- Touch-friendly tap targets

---

### Database/Storage

**Supabase PostgreSQL Tables (inferred from code):**
- users (name, bio, image_url, username, profile_font_color, badge, background, profile_layout)
- journals (title, content, post_type, created_at, user_id, canvas_doc, views, likes, comments, bookmarks)
- collections (title, description, user_id, journal_ids)
- opinions (content, user_id, created_at)
- notifications (type, actor_id, target_user_id, journal_id, read)
- bookmarks (journal_id, user_id, created_at)
- follows (follower_id, following_id)
- stories (title, description, cover_url, status, user_id)
- chapters (story_id, title, content, word_count, status, order)
- story_comments (chapter_id, user_id, content, paragraph_ref)

**Supabase Storage Buckets:**
- profile-images
- journal-images
- story-covers

---

This comprehensive overview covers all user-facing features, pages, components, and the overall structure of the iskrib_v3 application. The platform is a multi-format content creation and sharing social network supporting text posts, visual canvas art, serialized stories, and short-form opinions, with interactive features like the Universe visualization and Freedom Wall collaboration.
